model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ did + daca_eligible + birthyr_c + C(sex) + C(educ) + C(statefip) + C(year)', data=df, weights=df['perwt_adj']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated to US by 2007)
birthyr >= 1976 and birthyr <= 1996 (treatment cohort 1982-1996 + control cohort 1976-1981)
empstat in [1, 2, 3] (in civilian labor force or NILF; excludes N/A)
year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre-DACA and post-DACA years; 2012 excluded as transition year)
